paths.notes: HTML uses path-relative URLs (./, ../) so the same files work on IU Pages (manually upload j-adezhao/ as web root; deploy is not automatic from git) and on GitHub.com Pages when the repo is served from its root (URLs include /j-adezhao/site/). IU GitHub: github.iu.edu often holds this subtree.
